tasks.title: Define the validation matrix for {{.Name}}
acceptance: The required test, lint, review, or verification paths are identified
Success criteria are explicit before validation starts

tasks.title: Execute validation for {{.Name}}
acceptance: Relevant automated and manual checks are run
Failures are captured with concrete evidence

tasks.title: Close validation findings for {{.Name}}
acceptance: Critical findings are fixed or explicitly accepted
Residual risk and follow-up actions are documented
